name: MenuItem
visual_summary: MenuItem is a menu item UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable navbar behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: MenuItem
Description: MenuItem is a menu item UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable navbar behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: themeable, utility-styled
Interactions: interactive, keyboard-focus
Tags: item, mantine, menu, navbar

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
